mapper.select: select classroom_id AS classroomId,work_id AS workId from classroom_works WHERE classroom_id=#{classroomId} AND work_id=#{workId}
select classroom_id AS classroomId,work_id AS workId from classroom_works WHERE classroom_id=#{classroomId}
mapper.delete: delete from classroom_works WHERE classroom_id=#{classroomId} AND work_id=#{workId}
